question_text: Let 𝑋1, 𝑋2, 𝑋3 be three independent and identically distributed binomial random variables with number of trials 𝑛= 100 and success probability 𝑝⁡(0 < 𝑝< 1), which unknown parameter. Let 𝑇1 = (𝑋1 + 𝑋2, ⁡𝑋3)

options.A: nd 𝑇2 = 𝑋1 + 𝑋2 + 𝑋3. Consider the following statements: (I) The distribution of 𝑇2 given 𝑇1 = 𝑡1 is independent of 𝑝. (II) The distribution of 𝑇1 given 𝑇2 = 𝑡2 is independent of 𝑝. Which of the above statements is/are true?
